title: Moist Dense Japanese Flour Zenzai
description: A traditional Japanese dessert featuring roasted flour, this moist dense zenzai is a quick fix for any sweet tooth, it is vegetarian friendly and features mushimono steam cooking method.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour and salt.
Gradually add in water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into small balls and flatten each into a disk shape.
Place the disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with sesame oil.
Roast the flour disks in the oven for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
While the flour is roasting, prepare the azuki bean filling by mixing it with sugar.
Once the flour is ready, let it cool down and then steam it using the mushimono method for 10 minutes.
Serve the steamed flour with azuki bean filling and enjoy.
